title: crataegus aucuparia
intro: Crataegus aucuparia, also known as the European hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the rose family. The medicinal properties of Crataegus aucuparia lie in its ability to support cardiovascular health and reduce inflammation, attributed to its flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidin complexes (OPCs). The health benefits of this plant include lowering blood pressure, improving lipid profiles, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a popular natural remedy for heart health. Herbal preparations of Crataegus aucuparia include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement to support overall well-being.
